bioprojects.title: Genome sequencing of xanthomonads from the NCPPB

description.title: Microbe sample from Xanthomonas sp. NCPPB 2654

assemblyInfo.comments:
Bacteria and source DNA available from NCPPB, York, United Kingdom
The annotation was added by the NCBI Prokaryotic Genome Annotation Pipeline (PGAP). Information about PGAP can be found here: https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/genome/annotation_prok/
